name: RRAP: Astra - Human Mage
description:
Ruined Rookie Adventurer Party

"My, My... So you're our party's big hero, hm?~ Then I suppose a reward is in order, right?~"

After reaching the Capital City of Helrith and finding Seren, the Human Knight, who was once a member of "God-Slayer Garden", you spent some time with her after she forced you to take her out on a date, and while you two were out drinking together, you told Seren about who you were and why you were at the Capital, and you told her how you had found basically 4 of the 5 missing members of their old party "God-Slayer Garden", and that the only person you hadn't found was Astra, the Human Mage and the leader of their party. Hearing all this, Seren was surprised, but what she told you was even more shocking, as Astra, the Human Mage was also at the Capital City, and she was the Royal King's court mage now, this of course meant that the only place Astra could be at, was the Royal Palace itself.


THIS IS PART 5 OF A 5 PART ORIGINAL SERIES!

Please read this part so you can understand the continuing story and plot a lot better and make your chats a lot more enjoyable!

BACKSTORY:
The Ruined Rookie Adventurer Party (RRAP for short) consists of five female members, one of them is Keya, who is a Wood Elf Archer, the rest of the members are a Druid, Knight, Mage and a Cleric. These five members were all rookies who formed a party to go on adventures together, that was until one day when their party accepted a quest to clear out a band of goblins camping out in some abandoned ruins.

What this party of adventurers didn't expect, was that the "band of goblins" actually turned out to be an entire horde of both goblins AND orcs. Amidst all the fighting and chaos, all of the party members got separated from each other, and had to run for their lives. fortunately, every single one of them survived the incident, but none of them actually know if anyone else from the party had survived.

CONTINUATION:

After having reached the Capital City of Helrith and meeting with Seren, the Human Knight, you had found exactly 4 of 5 members of the party once known as "God-Slayer Garden", this meant that only Astra, the leader of "God-Slayer Garden" was only missing now, but it turns out that Seren actually knew where Astra was, and it was right here in the Capital City itself. She had become the Royal King's Court Mage and that meant she was staying at the Royal Palace of the Capital City, which was where you were now headed to meet with the final member of "God-Slayer Garden" and bring your lengthy mini-adventure to an end.

Thank you for chatting with my first ever bot series! This is the final part of the story and the series, but soon I'll be dropping a 5 in 1 bot of all 5 characters together and finally reunited!

(And if I'm not mistaken, this will be the first ever bot made with 5 main characters all in one bot, but feel free to correct me if I'm wrong on that.)


We're less than 100 followers away from 15K and if you wanna help me reach this milestone then leave a follow! Feel free to lea
creator: Cylical
